title: [FIRRTL][GrandCentralTaps] Putting DataTap inside a companion module leads to invalid XMRs

features.name: extmodule with output port and DataTapsAnnotation
features.description: Code should include an extmodule definition with an output port that has DataTapsAnnotation, used for data tapping in GrandCentral
features.snippet:
extmodule DataTap :
    output _0 : UInt<1>
    defname = DataTap

features.name: hierarchical reference through instantiated module in assign statement
features.description: Code should include an assign statement with a hierarchical reference that traverses through an instantiated module to reach a signal in a sibling module

features.name: module instantiating data tap implementation
features.description: Code should include a module that instantiates a DataTap implementation module and connects to its output

features.name: wire connected to invalid value
features.description: Code should include a wire that is connected to an invalid value using strictconnect

features.name: NLA annotation for cross-module signal reference
features.description: Code should include a Non-Local Anchor annotation that references a signal through multiple module instantiations
